task.title: Configuring an ethtool channels settings by using nmcli

context.p: The ethtool utility handles IRQ based communication with associated devices to manage related channels settings in connection profiles. Use the nmcli utility to configure ethtool settings in NetworkManager connection profiles.

step.cmd: Display the channels associated with a network device:

info.codeblock:
# ethtool --show-channels enp1s0
Channel parameters for enp1s0: Pre-set maximums: RX: 4 TX: 3 Other: 10 Combined: 63
Current hardware settings: RX: 1 TX: 1 Other: 1 Combined: 1

step.cmd: Update the channel settings of a network interface:

info.codeblock: # nmcli connection modify enp1s0 ethtool.channels-rx 4 ethtool.channels-tx 3 ethtools.channels-other 9 ethtool.channels-combined 50

li.p: Check the updated channel settings associated with the network device:
li.codeblock:
# ethtool --show-channels enp1s0
Channel parameters for enp1s0: Pre-set maximums: RX: 4 TX: 3 Other: 10 Combined: 63
Current hardware settings: RX: 4 TX: 3 Other: 9 Combined: 50
